subcodes.first_line: On those days wherein work is forbidden, let the farmer defer his irrigation until the following day; yet the shepherd is excused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایّامی که اشتغال حرام است فلّاح آبیاری را بروز بعد تأخیر نماید امّا چوپان معذور است
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @praise and encouragement, @agriculture
